settings.heading: Dry fruits and heritage mewa
settings.content: Best for tea-time, family serving, Ramadan tables, breakfast bowls, desserts and gift trays.

settings.heading: Premium nuts
settings.content: Best for clean snacking, desserts, trail mixes, breakfast bowls, hospitality and premium gifting.

settings.heading: Seeds and functional grains
settings.content: Best for breakfast bowls, soaked drinks, smoothies, salads, baking and modern pantry routines.

settings.heading: Herbs and daily botanicals
settings.content: Best for tea, aroma, kitchen use and traditional pantry routines. Use carefully and follow professional guidance where needed.

settings.heading: Roots, botanicals and traditional ingredients
settings.content: Best for customers who already understand traditional usage or are seeking guided pantry items. These require more careful usage and precaution language.

settings.heading: Gums and specialties
settings.content: Best for cooling drinks, texture, traditional recipes and special-purpose pantry use.

settings.heading: Natural sweeteners and salts
settings.content: Best for tea, breakfast, desserts, cooking and family pantry restocking.

settings.heading: Safety note
settings.content: Morganics products are food, pantry, herbal or traditional ingredients. They are not medical treatments. Use sensible portions and seek qualified guidance for specialty items.

settings.heading: Morganics Ingredient Guide
settings.intro: The Morganics Ingredient Guide helps customers understand categories, usage ideas, storage needs and safety notes before buying.
settings.cta_text: Message us with the product name, desired quantity and your city. Our team will guide you with availability and next steps.
